title: Recomputation receipt preserved as structural evidence only
description: A recomputation receipt is preserved as evidence that a bounded replay occurred, while the underlying artifact remains required for substantive review.

recomputation_receipt.receipt_claim: The bounded checker replay produced the recorded structural outcome.
non_claims: The receipt does not validate truth.
The receipt does not establish compliance.
The receipt does not establish legal sufficiency.
The receipt does not establish authorization.
The receipt does not approve the underlying artifact.
The receipt does not replace the underlying artifact.

non_authority_statement: This fixture preserves a recomputation receipt as structural evidence only; it does not validate, certify, authorize, approve, establish authorization, or establish truth, compliance, legal sufficiency, safety, or production readiness.
